# A-Z Truck Sales - AI Reference Document

## Site Overview
A-Z Truck Sales is a premier commercial vehicle dealer and restoration specialist in Alberton, Gauteng, South Africa. 25+ years experience selling and restoring quality used rigid trucks (1.5-16 tons).

## Main Pages

### Home - https://www.a-ztrucksales.com/
Premier commercial vehicle dealer in Alberton, Gauteng. Quality used rigid trucks 1.5-16 tons. Workshop-serviced vehicles.

### Inventory - https://www.a-ztrucksales.com/inventory
Browse our extensive inventory of quality used rigid trucks for sale in Gauteng. Ranging from 1.5 to 16 tons, all vehicles are restored and workshop serviced.

### Spares - https://www.a-ztrucksales.com/spares
Quality used truck spares and parts in Gauteng. We stock engines, gearboxes, diffs and more for various commercial vehicle makes.

### Specials - https://www.a-ztrucksales.com/specials
Latest truck specials and exclusive discounts on quality used commercial vehicles in Gauteng.

### Sell Your Truck - https://www.a-ztrucksales.com/sell-your-truck
Looking to sell or trade-in your used truck? We offer competitive prices and a transparent process for buying commercial vehicles in Gauteng.

### Contact - https://www.a-ztrucksales.com/contact
Contact A-Z Truck Sales in Alberton North, Gauteng. Get in touch for quotes and inquiries.

## Business Information
- Location: 159 Second Avenue, Alberton North, Gauteng, 1449, South Africa
- Phone: +27-11-902-6071
- Hours: Monday-Friday 7:30-17:00, Saturday 8:00-12:00

## Services
- Truck Sales
- Truck Restoration
- Trade-ins
- Workshop Services
- Truck Spares

## Vehicle Categories
- 1.5 Ton Trucks
- 3 Ton Trucks
- 4 Ton Trucks
- 5 Ton Trucks
- 8 Ton Trucks
- 10 Ton Trucks
- 16 Ton Trucks

## Brands
Hino, Isuzu, Ford, Iveco, Mercedes-Benz, Mitsubishi, Nissan, Toyota, UD Trucks, Volvo
